underlying_goal: Extract all music notation figures from a PDF book (Tonality.pdf), crop them individually, and convert to formats suitable for OMR tools to eventually create MIDI files
friction_detail: Claude's manual transcription of music notation from PDF was inaccurate (wrong notes/chords), prompting user to pivot to OMR tools instead.
brief_summary: User wanted all figures from a music theory PDF extracted as individual images; after Claude's manual transcription approach failed, they pivoted to cropping 645 figures as PNGs for external OMR processing, which succeeded.
